news.headline: ASBL President Lloyd Chapman writes open letter to Elon Musk, advocating for small businesses in US economy.
news.summary: Founded in 2004 in Petaluma, California, the American Small Business League (ASBL) advocates for fair treatment of small businesses in the American economy. ASBL President Lloyd Chapman recently addressed Elon Musk in an open letter regarding Musk's involvement in President Trump's administration and the "Make America Great Again" campaign. Chapman emphasized the importance of small businesses in the economy, with ASBL standing for these businesses to receive a fair share of the total value of prime contracts. Chapman's letter aimed to provide valuable information to Musk in light of his new role.

news.headline: Nexus Holdings launches Pathway Energy to produce ultra-carbon negative sustainable aviation fuels in Gulf Coast.
news.summary: Today, in Houston on December 12, 2024, Nexus Holdings unveiled its subsidiary Pathway Energy's groundbreaking use of bioenergy, carbon capture, and storage (BECCS) technology. This innovation allows for the production of ultra-carbon negative sustainable aviation fuels in the Gulf Coast region. Nexus Holdings, a key player in low-carbon initiatives, aims to significantly reduce carbon emissions by utilizing this technology. This marks a major step towards sustainability in the energy sector.

news.headline: Pin, AI recruitment platform, exits stealth with $3M, led by Expa Ventures. Aims to cut hiring time by 70%, help companies hire 10x faster.
news.summary: A recent funding round spearheaded by Expa Ventures is set to propel product development and marketing initiatives for Pin, an AI-powered recruitment tool. This advancement aims to assist numerous companies in expediting their hiring processes by up to 10 times through the automation of labor-intensive hiring tasks. The round signifies a significant step towards enhancing efficiency in recruitment operations.

news.headline: Valour launches 20 new ETPs on Spotlight Stock Market, increasing total to 60+ on European exchanges.
news.summary: Valour has made a significant milestone by introducing 20 new digital asset ETPs on the Spotlight Stock Market. This launch stands as the largest single-day ETP release in the company's history, bringing the total number of ETPs listed on European exchanges to over 60. This move showcases Valour's commitment to providing innovative access to digital assets for investors.

news.headline: Hostess® unveils new logo, packaging in rebranding effort. Refreshed image for iconic maker of sweet snacks.
news.summary: In Orrville, Ohio on December 12, 2024, a renowned snacking giant, Hostess®, launched a new chapter with the introduction of a revamped logo and packaging design. This marks a significant step in rebranding the company known for its soft and delectable sweet treats. The new visual identity aims to attract consumers with a modern and fresh look while maintaining the essence of the beloved brand. This update signifies a new era for Hostess®, offering a renewed experience to snack enthusiasts worldwide.

news.headline: Biopharmas increasingly use Veeva Compass Patient for commercialization, leveraging modern data for new patients and HCPs.
news.summary: Veeva Systems, located in Pleasanton, California, revealed on December 12, 2024, that there is a rising interest in Veeva Compass Patient, a prominent player in the realm of anonymous patient longitudinal data. This modern commercial data tool is proving beneficial for organizations seeking to identify new patients and healthcare providers. Veeva Compass Patient, which is a part of Veeva Systems listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol VEEV, is gaining momentum with its extensive data capabilities. This platform offers unlimited data access, aiding in the discovery of valuable insights for organizations in the healthcare sector.

news.headline: 5 tips from C & C Heating & Air Conditioning to protect your Detroit home from winter storms. Prep for -temps.
news.summary: A Detroit-based company specializing in heating and air conditioning, C & C Heating & Air Conditioning, recently offered valuable insights on keeping HVAC systems well-maintained to efficiently heat homes during extreme cold weather conditions. With temperatures dropping to negative levels, the company provided crucial tips to ensure optimal heating performance. This advice comes as a response to the expected harsh weather conditions in the Detroit area.

news.headline: Hamilton Zanze and Limekiln Real Estate partner to acquire new-issue Freddie Mac B-Piece Securities, forming a joint venture.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, Hamilton Zanze, a prominent real estate investment firm based in San Francisco, disclosed a new joint venture with Limekiln Real Estate Investment Management. Together, they acquired a stake in new-issue securities through a strategic partnership. This move signifies an important collaboration that would strengthen their position in the real estate market.

news.headline: ADF Group Inc. reported revenues of $262.2M, net income $16.4M for 3 mos & $47.7M for 9 mos ended Oct 31, 2024. Operating activities generated $53.3M. Gross margin % increased. Order backlog $330.3M. Good financial standing.
news.summary: ADF Group Inc., a steel superstructure fabricator, reported revenues of $262.2 million for the nine months ended October 31, 2024, an 8.1% increase from the previous year. Net income was $16.4 million for the three months and $47.7 million for the nine months, up by $5.2 million and $20.6 million respectively. Cash flow from operating activities reached $53.3 million. The Gross margin as a percentage of revenues improved significantly, partly due to better absorption of fixed costs and investments in automation. Adjusted EBITDA for the 9-month period was $72.0 million, a 78.1% increase. The order backlog stood at $330.3 million as of October 31, 2024, and the corporation had working capital of $105.4 million.

news.headline: Transat A.T. reports $788.8M revenue in Q4 fiscal 2024, $193.6M in FY. Adjusted EBITDA of $123.3M in Q4 and $193.6M for FY. Cash flow shows negative trends. Program aims at annual $100M EBITDA improvement. Cash and cash equivalents $260.3M in Oct 2024.
news.summary: Transat released its financial results for the fourth quarter ended October 31, 2024, showing a positive trend with revenues totaling $788.8 million, a 3.2% increase from the previous year. Adjusted EBITDA rose to $123.3 million from $89.0 million, and net income rocketed to $41.2 million from $3.2 million. The company reported negative free cash flow of $102.2 million, up from $83.8 million. Customer deposits reached $781.2 million, a 3.6% increase from October 31, 2023. Furthermore, they finalized a $33.6 million financial compensation deal with an equipment manufacturer due to grounded aircraft in 2023 and 2024. The fiscal year performance showcased revenue growth to $3,283.8 million, up by 7.7%, but the net loss was $114.0 million. Transat signaled a positive outlook for fiscal 2025, expecting stable capacity and an increase in consumer spending. The Elevation program is on track, set to contribute $25 million towards a $100 million annual adjusted EBITDA improvement, promising significant impacts in the second half of fiscal 2025. The company generated revenue growth and improved cash flow through the sale and leaseback of GTF2 engines, bolstering its liquidity position. Discussions to enhance the capital structure continue to be a priority. Key metrics including yield and load factors foresee growth in fiscal 2025. The conference call for the fourth quarter 2024 results is scheduled for December 12, 2024, with registration details available. First-quarter 2025 results will be announced on March 13, 2025. Transat's financial numbers are translated in Canadian dollars.

news.headline: Fennec Pharmaceuticals will be at H.C. Wainwright conference on Dec. 16, 2024 at 11:00 a.m. ET (NASDAQ:FENC; TSX: FRX)
news.summary: A specialty pharmaceutical company, Fennec Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ: FENC; TSX: FRX), based in Research Triangle Park, N.C., disclosed its upcoming involvement in the H.C. Wainwright @ Home Fireside Chat Series scheduled for December 16, 2024, at 11:00 a.m. ET. The event will be held virtually, allowing the company to engage with stakeholders and interested parties. It marks an important opportunity for Fennec Pharmaceuticals to showcase its progress and future prospects.

news.headline: D-Wave completes $175M equity offerings, surpassing initial $100M target, in the ATMs for common stock.
news.summary: Palo Alto-based D-Wave Quantum Inc. (NYSE: QBTS), a prominent quantum computing company, has recently finalized sales generating $175 million in gross proceeds from its common stock. This successful transaction was part of its earlier revealed "at-the-market" equity offering programs, totaling $100 million and $75 million. D-Wave stands out as the first commercial provider of quantum computers worldwide, offering cutting-edge systems, software, and services. The $75 million ATM Program has been effectively executed by the Company.

news.headline: Marqeta partners with Slope to provide Buy Now, Pay Later card, offering 30 or 60 day loan options for customers.
news.summary: In Oakland, California, Marqeta (NASDAQ: MQ) revealed its collaboration with Slope to introduce the Slope Card, offering low interest Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL) loans for commercial clients. Through this partnership, businesses can opt for 30 or 60-day loan options when making in-store or online payments. This initiative is designed to enhance flexibility and payment management for customers utilizing Marqeta's embedded finance solutions.

news.headline: Customer satisfaction with national banks increases as trust levels rise, according to J.D. Power.
news.summary: In Troy, Michigan, a recent report by J.D. Power indicates that customer satisfaction with national banks is on the rise, paralleled by an increase in trust levels. The data reveals an improvement in customer sentiment towards national banks, highlighting a positive trend in the industry. This shift is crucial as it underscores the importance of trust in financial institutions. The report signifies a notable improvement in customer experience, with satisfaction levels showing a promising increase. The findings suggest that national banks are making strides in enhancing their services and building trust with their clientele. This rise in customer satisfaction signals a positive trajectory for the banking sector.

news.headline: Ciena reports fiscal Q4 2024 financial results for November 2, 2024.
news.summary: Ciena Corporation, a company specializing in networking systems, services, and software, has released its financial results for the fiscal fourth quarter ending on November 2, 2024.

news.headline: Edwin Rubis releases debut book after 27 years in prison for nonviolent cannabis offense - "Unlocking Potential: Life Tips"
news.summary: In Los Angeles on December 12, 2024, Edwin Rubis, who has served 27 years out of a 40-year term for a nonviolent cannabis crime, has launched his first book titled "Unlocking Potential: Life Tips." This inspiring story showcases resilience and hope in the face of adversity, shedding light on Rubis's unwavering journey.

news.headline: N-able (NYSE: NABL) wins Top 50 Human Resources Team Award by OnCon. Celebrating achievements of top teams globally.
news.summary: N-able, Inc., a leading global software company (NYSE: NABL) specializing in assisting IT services providers with remote monitoring and management, data protection as-a-service, and security solutions, has been honored at the 2024 OnCon Icon Awards. The company was granted the Top 50 Human Resources Team award, acknowledging their excellence in the industry. The OnCon Icon Awards serve as a platform to recognize and celebrate the remarkable accomplishments of organizations and teams on a global scale. This recognition is particularly significant as it is based on evaluations from peers and industry competitors.

news.headline: Ciena appoints Lawton W. Fitt as independent Chair of the Board of Directors, effective December 11, 2024.
news.summary: Ciena® Corporation, based in Hanover, Maryland, recently disclosed that Lawton W. Fitt has been appointed as the independent Chair of Ciena's Board of Directors, with the appointment becoming effective on December 11, 2024.

news.headline: Adolfson & Peterson Construction excels in environmental construction, recognized for sustainability efforts.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, in Minneapolis, a national family-owned construction management and contracting company named Adolfson & Peterson Construction (AP) shared exciting news about its ongoing achievements in the environmental construction industry. This renowned company has once again gained recognition for its exceptional work in this sector.

news.headline: Global M&A deal value to hit $3.5 trillion in 2024; more practitioners using generative AI in deals, says Bain & Company.
news.summary: According to recent research conducted by Bain, a growing number of professionals involved in mergers and acquisitions have utilized generative artificial intelligence technology in their dealmaking procedures this year. They have found that this technology has been beneficial in terms of saving time, effort, and reducing costs. The 2024 M&A market in New York appears to be wrapping up the year in a similar manner to how it began, with high anticipation for upcoming deals and developments.

news.headline: NexGen Hyperbaric partners with Philadelphia Flyers to offer HBOT, first NHL team to do so - Dec. 12, 2024.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, NexGen Hyperbaric (NexGen) unveiled an innovative collaboration with the Philadelphia Flyers, establishing the team as pioneers within the National Hockey League (NHL) by incorporating hyperbaric oxygen therapy (HBOT) into their holistic wellness program. This groundbreaking partnership marks a significant milestone in sports therapy, setting a new standard for player care and performance optimization.

news.headline: Pathway Energy debuts with ultra negative sustainable aviation fuel, plans for new SAF facility on US Gulf Coast, aims to abate up to 6,000 long-haul flights annually.
news.summary: The inaugural facility of Pathway has paved the way towards achieving carbon-negative flights and is projected to offset emissions from as many as 6,000 long-haul flights each year. The company, Pathway Energy, was unveiled today as a fully owned subsidiary in Houston on December 12, 2024.

news.headline: Proven Behavior Solutions acquires Prism Autism Education & Consultation to enhance services and opportunities. Acquisition announced on Dec. 12, 2024.
news.summary: A collaboration has been established to improve services and create more job opportunities in the regions of Norwell, Massachusetts, and Farmington, Connecticut. On December 12, 2024, Proven Behavior Solutions, a prominent company offering outpatient therapy for children with autism in Massachusetts, successfully completed the acquisition process. This strategic move is set to significantly enhance the existing services while opening new doors for employees in the field.

news.headline: Juniper Square expands with new hires Eric Jenny as CFO and Eric Thum as SVP of Marketing, aiming for further growth.
news.summary: In a press release on December 12, 2024, Juniper Square, a top provider of cutting-edge fund technology and administration services for the private markets, revealed the appointment of Eric Jenny as Chief Financial Officer and Eric Thum as Senior Vice President of Marketing. This strategic move aims to strengthen the executive team, harnessing their expertise to drive the company forward. Juniper Square's decision to bring on Jenny and Thum signifies a pivotal moment in the company's growth trajectory, signaling a commitment to expanding and enhancing their services. This announcement comes as Juniper Square continues to solidify its position in the industry, showcasing their dedication to innovation and leadership in the market.

news.headline: TrueBlue's PeopleReady launches new version of JobStack app, enhancing staffing speed and success. TACOMA, Wash., Dec. 12, 2024 - TrueBlue (NYSE: TBI) introduces new features for workforce matching.
news.summary: A notable increase in staffing efficiency and effectiveness has been observed following the integration of a potent workforce matching system and the introduction of enhanced features by TrueBlue in Tacoma, Washington on December 12, 2024. PeopleReady, a division of TrueBlue and a key player in providing tailored workforce solutions, has rolled out advanced elements in its acclaimed platform. This initiative has resulted in a notable surge in the pace and success rate of staffing operations. TrueBlue, known globally and listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol TBI, has solidified its position as a leader in the industry with this strategic move.

news.headline: First Home Mortgage names Matt Nader as President amid evolving mortgage industry challenges.
news.summary: Baltimore-based First Home Mortgage has recently appointed Matt Nader as its new President, effective December 12, 2024. This leadership change comes as the company addresses challenges within the mortgage industry amid rapid changes. Nader's appointment is significant in guiding the organization through this dynamic landscape.

news.headline: Opera declares $0.40 per share cash dividend under recurring program in Oslo. Board of Directors announces semi-annual dividend.
news.summary: In Oslo, Norway on December 12, 2024, Opera Limited (NASDAQ: OPRA), a prominent browser developer and internet consumer brand, revealed its Board of Directors' decision to declare the next semi-annual cash dividend. This news comes as Opera continues its trajectory as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: Chris Hirth promoted to Executive VP of Asset Management at Capital Square, a top real estate investment company.
news.summary: In Richmond, Virginia, on December 12, 2024, a prominent real estate investment sponsor, Capital Square, revealed the elevation of Chris Hirth to the role of executive vice president of asset management. Capital Square is known for its expertise in tax-advantaged real estate investments and its active role in developing and overseeing housing communities across the nation. This announcement marks a significant milestone for Hirth, as he takes on a key position within the company to lead asset management operations. It signifies Capital Square's continued commitment to growth and excellence in the real estate sector.

news.headline: Siyata Mobile Inc. (Nasdaq: SYTA) to host press event for important corporate development. Dec 12, 2024.
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on December 12, 2024, Siyata Mobile Inc. (Nasdaq: SYTA), a leading developer and provider of Push-to-Talk over Cellular (PoC) devices and accessories, has revealed plans to hold a press event.

news.headline: Altair partners with CGI for IT modernization and AI innovation. Altair (Nasdaq: ALTR) and CGI come together to drive change in computational intelligence.
news.summary: In Troy, Michigan on December 12, 2024, a leading computational intelligence company, Altair (Nasdaq: ALTR), has revealed a collaboration with CGI, a prominent independent firm specializing in IT and business consulting services. This partnership is designed to expedite IT modernization efforts.

news.headline: InspireMD CFO Craig Shore to retire in 2025 after successor is appointed; will assist in smooth transition.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, InspireMD, Inc. made an announcement in Miami regarding their Chief Financial Officer, Craig Shore. InspireMD, Inc., listed on Nasdaq as NSPR, is known for developing the CGuard™ Embolic Prevention Stent System (EPS) aimed at preventing strokes. Craig Shore has disclosed his decision to retire from the company, subject to the appointment of a new CFO. Until a successor is found and instated, Mr. Shore will continue in his role as CFO and facilitate a seamless transition process.

news.headline: Bio-Techne partners with MedSanTek to distribute products in Turkey, aiming to expand access to their portfolio. #BioTech #MedSanTek #Turkey #Distribution
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, Bio-Techne Corporation (NASDAQ: TECH), a leading life sciences firm offering cutting-edge tools and bioactive reagents for research and clinical diagnostics, revealed a collaboration with MedSanTek. This partnership involves a strategic agreement wherein...

news.headline: Osisko Development secures Environmental Management Act permits for Cariboo Gold Project in BC, completing key approvals.
news.summary: In Montreal on December 12, 2024, Osisko Development Corp. received Environmental Management Act permits for its Cariboo Gold Project in central British Columbia, Canada. The Project, fully owned by the company, has now obtained all necessary permits, including BC Mines Act permits secured on November 20, 2024. This marks the completion of the permitting process, solidifying the Cariboo Gold Project's shovel-ready status. Osisko Development Corp. is listed on NYSE as ODV and on TSXV as ODV.

news.headline: Tilray launches Hemp-Derived Delta-9 THC beverages under Herb & Bloom brand; non-alcoholic cocktails now on sale.
news.summary: A new line of ready-to-drink, non-alcoholic effervescent beverages called Herb & Bloom has been launched by Tilray's Alternative Beverages. These cocktail-inspired drinks are now on the market, offering consumers a refreshing and alcohol-free option.

news.headline: Clifton Mining (OTCBB: CFTN) receives notice of Desert Hawk Gold Corp. exiting bankruptcy court. Property Lease Acquisition.
news.summary: In American Fork, Utah on December 12, 2024, Desert Hawk Gold Corp. - Clifton Mining has been informed that Desert Hawk Gold Corp. has successfully emerged from chapter 11 bankruptcy, with their case officially closed by the bankruptcy court. The company has acquired a significant property lease. The specific details regarding this lease and the management actions taken following the bankruptcy process have not been disclosed in the provided information.

news.headline: POET Technologies offering of 5M units at US$5 each for US$25M, with warrants for additional shares at US$6. Issuing stock and warrants for expansion.
news.summary: Toronto, December 12, 2024 - POET Technologies Inc. (TSXV: PTK; NASDAQ: POET) has revealed plans for a non-brokered public offering involving 5,000,000 units at a cost of US$5.00 (C$7.08) per unit, resulting in total earnings of US$25 million. Each unit will consist of one common share and one-half of a common share purchase warrant, with each whole warrant allowing the acquisition of one common share at a price of US$6.00 (C$8.50) for a span of five years from the issuance date. POET is renowned for its POET Optical Interposer™, Photonic Integrated Circuits (PICs), and light sources tailored for various markets including data centers, telecommunication, and artificial intelligence.

news.headline: Deloitte to showcase innovation at CES 2025 to boost client competitiveness with tech and expertise.
news.summary: In December 12, 2024, in Las Vegas, Deloitte will be emphasizing on uniting individuals, technologies, and skills essential for creating a competitive edge for its clients amid CES® 2025. The company aims to leverage its unmatched business expertise and proficiency in state-of-the-art solutions to deliver enhanced value.

news.headline: Iridium launches revolutionary Iridium Certus 9704 Module for Satellite IoT, ideal for data transfer and positioning.
news.summary: The latest module is compatible with the Iridium Certus 9704 Development Kit, catering to data, audio messages, and image transfers. This integration positions companies to be more prepared for the future and the advent of Satellite AIoT. This development comes from Iridium Communications Inc. based in McLean, Virginia, and was announced on December 12, 2024.

news.headline: CytoSorbents to host investor meetings during J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference Week in San Francisco from Jan 13-15, 2025.
news.summary: CytoSorbents has announced plans to hold in-person investor meetings at the JP Morgan Healthcare Conference in San Francisco from January 13-15, 2025. This conference will provide a platform for engagement with potential investors and showcase the company's developments and strategies.

news.headline: First Helium obtains licenses for first two wells targeting Leduc Light Oil at Worsley, preparing to drill at 7-30 and 7-15 locations, with plans for an additional 10-well program.
news.summary: A company is gearing up to conduct drilling operations at two oil locations labeled as 7-30 and 7-15. This initiative serves as a precursor to a more extensive drilling program involving a total of 10 wells.

news.headline: MoneyThumb reports record growth in 2024, leading in underwriting automation software, helping lenders fund small businesses.
news.summary: A leading provider of automated document evaluation and fraud detection solutions, MoneyThumb, revealed impressive growth figures as it wraps up the year 2024 in San Diego. The company experienced record-breaking annual growth, highlighting the increasing demand for underwriting automation software in the industry.

news.headline: Bowie State University partners with Xtract One for enhanced campus security.
Elicio Therapeutics reports 16.3-month mRFS and 28.9-month mOS in ELI-002 Phase 1 study at ESMO Congress 2024.
news.summary: Newly released data from Phase 1 trial shows promising results with a median recurrence-free survival (mRFS) of 16.3 months and median overall survival (mOS) of 28.9 months across the entire study population.

news.headline: Kings College NHS Trust partners with Blink Charging for 41 EV chargers at London hospital; service starts May 2025.
news.summary: London, UK - Blink Charging UK has secured a three-year contract to oversee 41 electric vehicle chargers and contactless payment terminals at Princess Royal University Hospital, part of Kings College NHS Trust. The project, beginning in May 2025, will benefit hospital patients, visitors, and staff by providing convenient access to charging infrastructure. The 41 new charging bays will be complemented by 21 contactless payment terminals for easy and efficient transactions. Blink Charging Co., a prominent global provider of EV charging solutions, owns Blink Charging UK.

news.headline: Zentalis Pharmaceuticals appoints Wendy Chang as Chief People Officer and Haibo Wang as Chief Business Officer.
news.summary: Wendy Chang has been named as the Chief People Officer while Haibo Wang has been appointed as the Chief Business Officer. This change in leadership roles reflects the organization's strategic restructuring plan aimed at optimizing its operations and driving growth. Wendy Chang brings a wealth of experience in human resources management to her new role, while Haibo Wang's extensive background in business development makes him well-suited for the position. The appointments of Wendy Chang and Haibo Wang signal a new phase in the company's direction as it strives to enhance its focus on people management and business expansion.

news.headline: Fractyl Health presents positive preclinical data on RJVA-001 Rejuva Smart GLP-1 gene therapy at WCIRDC.
news.summary: In the latest update, it has been reported that the current global population stands at approximately 7.8 billion people. The total number of confirmed COVID-19 cases worldwide has now exceeded 100 million, with over 2 million deaths attributed to the virus. Moreover, the vaccination efforts have resulted in around 50 million doses administered across numerous countries. The economic impact of the pandemic is evident, with a projected decrease in global GDP by 3.5% in 2020. The ongoing distribution of vaccines remains a critical objective in combating the spread of the virus and facilitating a return to normalcy.

news.headline: Abaxx Technologies opens new offices in Hong Kong and Beijing to expand brand awareness in the region.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, Abaxx Technologies Inc. (CBOE: ABXX, OTCQX: ABXXF) revealed the establishment of new representative offices in Hong Kong and Beijing to boost brand recognition in the region. Abaxx, a financial software and market infrastructure firm and the major stakeholder of Abaxx Singapore Pte Ltd., which owns Abaxx Commodity Exchange and Clearinghouse, shared this development. The move aligns with the company's strategy to broaden its presence.

news.headline: OTC Markets Group welcomes Rigel Resource Acquisition Corp (OTCQX: RRACF) to trade its shares on OTCQX from Pink market.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, the OTC Markets Group Inc. revealed that Rigel Resource Acquisition Corp (OTCQX: RRACF), a special purpose acquisition company, has been approved to trade its Class A Ordinary Shares on the OTCQX® Best Market. The OTC Markets Group Inc. manages regulated markets for trading 12,000 U.S. and international securities. Rigel Resource Acquisition Corp transitioned from the Pink® market to the OTCQX, marking a significant upgrade in its trading status.

news.headline: CervoMed grants equity awards to 2 new employees as inducement, in line with Nasdaq rules.
news.summary: CervoMed Inc., a clinical stage company dedicated to creating therapies for age-related neurologic disorders, disclosed that on December 12, 2024, it provided equity awards in the form of inducements for two recently hired staff members. The company, listed on NASDAQ as CRVO, made this announcement from Boston.

news.headline: Fury Gold Mines reviews 2024 milestones: acquired project, increased resources, new discovery, C$5M treasury, 51M shares.
news.summary: In Toronto on December 12, 2024, Fury Gold Mines Limited (TSX: FURY, NYSE American: FURY) shared its corporate and exploration accomplishments over the past year. In 2024, Fury made significant progress by acquiring full ownership of the Éléonore South project. They also revealed an enhanced Mineral Resource Estimate at the Eau Claire project, with a notable increase of 307Koz gold (Au) in the Measured and Indicated category (a 36.0% rise) and 223koz Au in the Inferred category (a 44.6% increase). Additionally, Fury successfully drilled a new discovery at the Serendipity Prospect, where they found 12.16 grams of gold per tonne over 3 meters. The year concluded on a high note financially, with C$5 million in the treasury and ownership of 51 million common shares of Dolly Varden Silver.
